events.name: VfL Bochum at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Mainz 05's Lee Jae-sung scored either side of the break as the hosts stunned Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich 2-1 on Saturday to snap their unbeaten league run this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern stunned by Mainz for first loss of season

video.headline: Mainz hand Bayern first Bundesliga loss under Kompany
